creator: alex.perechnev@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)
I've tried to compile it with QT6 and found two facts:

1. The build system depends on QT5, but it can be solved with additional patches.
2. The program itself depends on a few components (like xmlpatterns) which are presented in QT5 only and aren't available in QT6.

So at this moment it can work with QT5 only.
